objective: Retry TASK-0004 with full evidence. Produce a complete RAG knowledge base status snapshot from Ubuntu and push results through Git.

Confirm Chroma collection name and document count
Confirm Ollama models list includes active model

execution_instructions: Run required commands and capture outputs
Write pilot_v1/results/TASK-0004A.result.json using the schema below
